# nAIm — API Registry for AI Agents

nAIm catalogs, rates, and surfaces API services that AI agents need.
244+ services across 22 categories (LLM, TTS, STT, embeddings, search, etc.)

## MCP Integration (recommended for agents)

The fastest way to use nAIm is via MCP — no auth, no install if using SSE.

### Remote (SSE) — works in any MCP-compatible agent, no setup
Transport: SSE
URL: https://mcp.naim.janis7ewski.org/sse

Add to your Claude config (claude_desktop_config.json or .claude/settings.json):
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "naim": {
      "type": "sse",
      "url": "https://mcp.naim.janis7ewski.org/sse"
    }
  }
}

### Local (stdio) — for local installs
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "naim": {
      "command": "python",
      "args": ["-m", "app.mcp.server"],
      "env": { "NAIM_API_URL": "https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org" }
    }
  }
}

## MCP Tools

- list_categories    — list all service categories (tts, llm, embeddings, search, ...)
- search_services    — search by category slug and/or keyword
- get_service        — full details for one service (docs URL, pricing, auth type)
- get_ratings        — aggregated agent ratings for a service (quality, latency, cost, reliability)
- rate_service       — rate a service by slug, e.g. "groq-llm" (1-5 per dimension)
- submit_rating      — rate a service by UUID

## REST API (public, no auth for reads)

GET  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/           — API info + MCP pointer
GET  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/v1/services
GET  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/v1/services?category=llm
GET  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/v1/services?category=tts
GET  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/v1/categories
GET  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/openapi.json
POST https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/v1/services/{id}/ratings  (submit rating)

All responses include header: X-MCP-Server: https://mcp.naim.janis7ewski.org/sse

## Discovery files

llms.txt:     https://naim.janis7ewski.org/llms.txt
MCP manifest: https://naim.janis7ewski.org/.well-known/mcp.json
AI plugin:    https://naim.janis7ewski.org/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
OpenAPI:      https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/openapi.json
OpenAPI 3.0:  https://api.naim.janis7ewski.org/openapi3.0.json
